rationale: Simplified _report_publication_metadata with declared-key comprehensions and guarded declared_outputs access in the MM-504 follow-up commit.
Top-level review summary only; no separate actionable request beyond the inline comment already addressed.
Removed the duplicate dockerMode alias so workflowDockerMode remains the single canonical mode field across launcher metadata, tests, and MM-504 spec artifacts.
Top-level Codex review wrapper only; the actionable inline feedback was handled separately.
Removed the redundant os.environ argument when computing the retrieval capability note state.

Managed Codex retrieval guidance now treats gateway transport as unavailable until there is a usable authenticated managed-session path, so the prompt no longer advertises a 401-only capability.
The launcher now passes the run-scoped materialized environment into workspace preparation so the capability note reflects the actual launch environment rather than process-global defaults.
